column2: prompt

column1: # All prompts are cold-start, zero-context, first-message interactions.
# Prompts must not contain the pipe character.
# Change from v4.1.0: prompts 12, 17 now block ("it" check at all token counts).
# Prompts 16, 20 remain known gaps (no "it"/"this" token, or entity misidentification).
# "that" removed from REFERENCE_TOKENS — too ambiguous (relative pronoun vs demonstrative).
